claim: ReAct pattern with function calling needs only one reasoner node and one tools node instead of separate nodes per tool
actionable: Replace complex multi-node agent graphs with simple: reasoner→conditional→tools→reasoner loop using prebuilt ToolsNode and tool_condition.
source_title: Building a LangGraph ReAct Mini Agent

claim: MessageState in LangGraph appends messages rather than overwriting, making history automatically available across nodes
actionable: Use LangGraph's MessageState instead of custom state dicts to automatically handle message accumulation and history passing.
source_title: Building a LangGraph ReAct Mini Agent

claim: Agents can loop through multiple tool calls in a single ReAct workflow by routing back to reasoner after tool execution
actionable: Implement tool-looping by: reasoner decides on tool→executes tool→returns result to reasoner with full history→reasoner decides next step.
source_title: Building a LangGraph ReAct Mini Agent

claim: Custom tool functions should have default parameters and kwargs to handle LLM outputs with missing or extra arguments
actionable: Add default parameters and **kwargs to tool functions to gracefully handle LLM inconsistencies in argument generation.
source_title: Building a LangGraph ReAct Mini Agent

claim: Tool bindings to LLM must include tool schemas so model can determine which function to call via function calling
actionable: Always bind tool definitions to LLM before invoking: `llm_with_tools = llm.bind_tools(tools)` so model has complete schema information.
source_title: Building a LangGraph ReAct Mini Agent
